title: Add admin page listing all registered members

requirements.text: Create an Admin page (route: /admin) that fetches all registered members from the backend using the existing useGetAllMembers query hook and displays them in a styled table showing each member's name, email, role, and sign-up timestamp. Apply the Blue Panthers navy/gold visual theme consistently with the rest of the site.

quotes: add an admin page to your Blue Panthers site that lists everyone who has signed up

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin renders the Admin page without errors
The page displays a table or list of all registered members
Each row shows the member's name, email, role (Player/Fan/Supporter), and sign-up timestamp
The page uses the Blue Panthers navy/gold theme consistent with existing pages
If no members have signed up, a friendly empty-state message is shown
The admin route is accessible from the navigation bar

requirements.text: Add an 'Admin' navigation link in the shared Layout navigation bar (desktop and mobile menus) that routes to /admin.

quotes: add an admin page to your Blue Panthers site that lists everyone who has signed up

acceptanceCriteria: An 'Admin' link appears in both the desktop and mobile navigation menus
The link style is consistent with existing nav items

requirements.text: Register the /admin route in the TanStack Router configuration in App.tsx so the Admin page is reachable.

quotes: add an admin page to your Blue Panthers site that lists everyone who has signed up

acceptanceCriteria: The /admin route is defined in App.tsx alongside the existing / and /signup routes
Navigating directly to /admin renders the Admin page

constraints: Do not modify the backend — the existing getAllMembers endpoint already returns all members sorted by signup time
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/main.tsx
Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Authentication or access control for the admin page
Ability to delete or edit members from the admin page
